about: Suggest something GhostClaw should do

## What would you like?


## Use case
When would you use this? What problem does it solve?

## Notes
Features are typically built as **skills** (markdown files in `.claude/skills/`), not core code changes. See the [skills repo](https://github.com/b1rdmania/ghostclaw-skills) for examples.
